Package egovframework.let.sec.gmt.service.impl

Class EgovGroupManageServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
org.egovframe.rte.fdl.cmmn.EgovAbstractServiceImpl
egovframework.let.sec.gmt.service.impl.EgovGroupManageServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
EgovGroupManageService
@Service("egovGroupManageService") public class EgovGroupManageServiceImpl extends org.egovframe.rte.fdl.cmmn.EgovAbstractServiceImpl implements EgovGroupManageService
그룹관리에 관한 ServiceImpl 클래스를 정의한다.
Since:
2009.06.01
Version:
1.0
Author:
